basic_details.job_title: NCRTC Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) Recruitment 2026: National Capital Region Transport Corporation has released the official notification for 1 Assistant Manager/ Telecom posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years, OBC-NCL: 3 Years, PwBD: 10 Years, Ex-Serviceman: 5 Years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B. Tech. in Electronics Engineering (EE)/ Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE)/ Electrical & Electronics Engineering (EEE)/ Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering (ETE) or its equivalent (Full Time). Minimum 05 years of post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Assistant Manager/ Telecom: B.E./ B. Tech. in Electronics Engineering (EE)/ Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE)/ Electrical & Electronics Engineering (EEE)/ Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering (ETE) or its equivalent (Full Time). Minimum 05 years of post-qualification experience.

selection_process: Written Test/ CBT Interview Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NCRTC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom positions is 10 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./ B. Tech. degree in Electronics Engineering or equivalent from a recognized institution. Full-time education is mandatory, and a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month, depending on their experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom position in the National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NCRTC Assistant Manager/ Telecom recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NCRTC recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category. Candidates from General, OBC, SC, and ST categories can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Manager/ Telecom post?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test/ CBT, followed by an Interview. Document Verification and the final Merit List will also be part of the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Manager/ Telecom position is offered on a contractual basis by the National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is New Delhi, within the National Capital Region.
